retry_reason: Not a wrapper — the get operation is part of broader selection logic; retry semantics are irrelevant.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to select and switch the device used for RTPG (transmit RTPG command) within the ALUA port group, involving list traversal, disabling an existing device, and updating pg->rtpg_sdev. The scsi_device_get call is incidental to the selection process, not the main goal.
